description: Drawer opens CollaborativeEditor when clicking an in-app document in edit mode
CollaborativeEditor connects to correct Hocuspocus room (document:<tenantId>:<documentId>)
Detect BlockNote JSON format: array with objects having 'props' field
Detect ProseMirror JSON format: object with type:'doc'
Detect empty/null block_data and initialize empty document
Convert BlockNote paragraph block to ProseMirror paragraph node
Convert BlockNote paragraph with styled text (bold, italic, underline) to ProseMirror marks
Convert BlockNote heading block (levels 1-3) to ProseMirror heading node
Convert BlockNote bulletListItem blocks to ProseMirror bullet_list > list_item
Convert BlockNote numberedListItem blocks to ProseMirror ordered_list > list_item
Convert BlockNote link inline content to ProseMirror link mark
Convert BlockNote mention inline content to ProseMirror (preserve or drop gracefully)
Convert BlockNote codeBlock to ProseMirror code_block node
Convert BlockNote blockquote (quote) to ProseMirror blockquote node
Conversion handles empty blocks (no content) without crashing
Conversion handles nested children blocks
Existing ProseMirror JSON document loads without conversion in CollaborativeEditor
Existing BlockNote JSON document loads correctly after conversion in CollaborativeEditor
Save button triggers syncCollabSnapshot and persists content to document_block_content
Closing drawer triggers snapshot (best-effort, doesn't block close)
When Hocuspocus is unreachable, editor falls back to single-user mode within 3 seconds
Fallback mode allows editing and saving via manual Save button
Fallback mode shows 'Offline — manual save mode' status indicator
Two users opening same document in drawers see each other's cursors
Presence bar in drawer shows names/avatars of connected users
Changes from user A appear in user B's drawer in real-time
New document creation: drawer opens with empty CollaborativeEditor, document record created in DB
Read-only view mode renders document content without editing
Document name can be edited in the drawer header
Unsaved changes warning appears when closing drawer in fallback mode with pending changes
After BlockNote-to-ProseMirror conversion, converted format is persisted back to DB
Round-trip: content saved by CollaborativeEditor can be reopened in CollaborativeEditor
Formatting toolbar (BubbleMenu) works inside the drawer CollaborativeEditor
Emoticon extension works in drawer CollaborativeEditor (:) converts to emoji)
Link auto-detection works in drawer CollaborativeEditor
